prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated B16B (96 Spec R engine code, 185 PS @ 8,200 RPM, 119 lb-ft @ 7,500 RPM) with a Hasport Performance B-series swap kit (CRX-specific mounts, axles, and subframe reinforcements) and a Toda Racing B16B stroker kit (84mm crank, 87mm pistons, 11.5:1 compression) paired with Toda Racing Type-R spec camshafts (280° duration, 11.5mm lift) and a Toda Racing adjustable cam gear set for precise timing.

Full bolt-on intake and exhaust system featuring a Mugen Power Flow 60mm throttle body, HKS Super Power Flow Type-R air filter, and a custom 4-2-1 stainless steel header (37mm primaries, 50mm collectors) by Hytech Exhaust, paired with a 2.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system terminating in a Mugen MF-10 slip-on muffler for optimal scavenging and high-RPM power delivery.

Suspension overhaul with Tein Flex Z coilovers (CRX-specific valving, 32-way adjustable damping, 10kg/mm front springs, 8kg/mm rear springs) paired with Energy Suspension polyurethane bushings (full set: control arms, sway bar, subframe), Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (18mm), and a Cusco front strut tower bar (22mm hollow section) for chassis rigidity and precise cornering.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny CR-X Version 3 widebody kit (fiberglass fenders, front bumper, rear bumper, side skirts) with custom carbon fiber overfenders (2-inch wider front, 3-inch wider rear) and a Seibon carbon fiber hood (ducktail design, 50% weight reduction over OEM).

OEM+ JDM-spec lighting upgrade with Stanley HID projector headlights (55W, 4300K), Depo Racing clear side markers, and a custom LED taillight conversion (using Osram LED chips, sequential turn signals, smoked lenses).

Interior stripped and rebuilt with a Bride Zeta III (low-back, CRX-specific mounting brackets) driver’s seat, Takata Drift II 4-point harness, Mugen pedal set (aluminum, CRX-specific bolt pattern), and a Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel (Mugen hub adapter) paired with a Mugen short shifter (50% reduction in throw) and a custom aluminum shift knob (weighted, 150g).
